basics.name: Kailong Wang
basics.label: Ph.D. Candidate
basics.summary: A Ph.D. candidate of Rutgers University Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering. Cutting edge researcher in ISAC MIMO OTFS Systems design for the 6G Wireless Framework. Experts in Digital Signal Processing, Probability Theory, Machine/Deep Learning, Convex Analysis, Bayesian Methods.

work.name: Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering, Rutgers University
work.position: Ph.D. Candidate, Research Assistant, Teaching Assistant
work.summary: Design efficient and effective ISAC MIMO OTFS system. Teaching Probability Theory and Cryptograph.
highlights: ISAC MIMO OTFS radar and communication system design appears in top-tier conferences, journals, and patents.
Collaborated in designing learning-based WiFi-sensing algorithms using off-the-shelf devices with publication in conferences and journals.

education.area: Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering
